title: Veettukkoru Saamiyundu Lyrics Jeyikkira Kuthira
stanzas: <div>Veettukkoru Saamiyundu Lyrics Jeyikkira Kuthira Songs Lyrics

Veettuku oru saamiyundu
adhu amma amma daa.
naama kovil kulam
povathellaam ada
summa summaa da.(3)

ava ezhutha padikkala
aanaa enna padichchava.
enna idupil thookkithaan
andha nilava pudichava.

Veettuku oru saamiyundu
adhu amma amma daa.
naama kovil kulam
povathellaam ada
summa summaa da

Mutta mutta paal koduthu
thatti thatti thoonga vachi
anachchiye
vaari anachchiye

kotta kotta mazhaiyilathaan
chotta chotta naan nenanjaa
sabichiye mazhaiya
sabichiye

siru maangaa kadichi
masakka poakki
maavu velakku
manasil yaethi.
Kaanaa kovil
viradham irundhiye

maru jenmam edukkayil
un paadham sumakkanum
naan thaayaa porandhu
madi thaangi valarkkanum

Veettuku oru saamiyundu
adhu amma amma daa.
naama kovil kulam
povathellaam ada
summa summaa da

Noi nodiyil padukkaliye
novu vandhu irakkalaiye
adukkumaa
ayyoo adukkumaa

kambu ooni nadakkalaiye
kannu paarva koraiyalaiye
saabamaa
idhu paavamaa

nee noolaa elachi
nondhu vendhu
aduppu oodhi
irumi kedandhu
enna nenachi
azhudhu sevandhiye

nee kalavu poniyaa
vinnail ulavu poniyaa
nee elavu aaniyaa
enna izhandhu poniyaa

Veettuku oru saamiyundu
adhu amma amma daa.
naama kovil kulam
povathellaam ada
summa summaa da

ava ezhutha padikkala
aanaa enna padichchava.
enna idupil thookkithaan
andha nilava pudichava.

seo.title: Veettukkoru Saamiyundu Lyrics Jeyikkira Kuthira

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Veettukkoru Saamiyundu celebrates the joy of life and community, emphasizing togetherness and happiness.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Jeyikkira Kuthira, the song is performed during a festive celebration, highlighting the characters' joyful moments.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Madhu Balakrishnan, known for his energetic performances.

Who composed the music for this track?

The music for Veettukkoru Saamiyundu is composed by Kawin Siva, who brings a lively touch to the song.

When was this song released?

This song was released on March 15, 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Veettukkoru Saamiyundu, the lively beats and cheerful lyrics encapsulate the essence of celebration and togetherness. The song plays a pivotal role in Jeyikkira Kuthira, showcasing moments of joy among the characters. It evokes feelings of happiness and energy, making it perfect for festive occasions. With Madhu Balakrishnan's vibrant vocals, the track invites listeners to join in the celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Veettukkoru Saamiyundu from the movie Jeyikkira Kuthira is a vibrant celebration of life and joy, brought to life by the energetic vocals of Madhu Balakrishnan. The song's catchy beats and lively rhythm make it a perfect addition to any festive occasion. Experience the infectious energy that makes this track a must-listen for all Tamil music lovers!
stanzaMeanings: There is a deity in every home, oh mother. We can go to the temple together, just casually.
She doesn't learn what she writes, but what have I learned? I just picked up that moonlight.
There is a deity in every home, oh mother. We can go to the temple together, just casually.
Giving milk and eggs, making a bed for the aunt, oh aunt.
In the pouring rain, I thought of small things, I remembered the rain.
You gave blood and milk, oh mother, don't let the debt remain, oh mother.
Cutting small mangoes, throwing them away, the flour lamp is in my mind. The temple's vow is still there.
In the next birth, I must follow your footsteps, oh mother, I was born to nurture you.
There is a deity in every home, oh mother. We can go to the temple together, just casually.
Is it okay to sleep with pain in the body? Is it okay to bear the pain?
The millet won't walk, will it? Look at the eyes, is this a curse?
Life's flavor will end, oh mother, is it a sin to say what I feel?
You took the thread and lit the fire, I thought of you and cried, oh my dear.
You went away to the sky, did you lose your way? You lost your way, oh my dear, where did you go?
There is a deity in every home, oh mother. We can go to the temple together, just casually.
She doesn't learn what she writes, but what have I learned? I just picked up that moonlight.
There is a deity in every home, oh mother. We can go to the temple together, just casually.
